title: Motorcycle Rider / Dispatch Rider
description: Make deliveries across Benin City on our fleet of well-maintained motorcycles. Must have valid license and good knowledge of city routes.

title: Customer Support Representative
description: Assist customers with booking, tracking, and inquiries via phone, WhatsApp, and email. Great communication skills required.

title: Operations Coordinator
description: Coordinate daily dispatch operations, optimise rider routes, and ensure timely deliveries across all zones.

title: Logistics Officer
description: Manage inventory, package sorting, and loading operations at our central dispatch hub.

title: Marketing & Sales Officer
description: Drive brand awareness and customer acquisition through digital marketing, partnerships, and community outreach in Benin City.
